description_long: This is a modern, spacious house set within a walled property featuring a large backyard, a swimming pool, and manicured landscaping with trees and hedges. The main building is two stories tall with a flat roof and multiple large windows, providing ample natural light. The property includes a detached garage and a covered patio area, as well as paved walkways and driveways. The front entryway is marked by a prominent gate, a short path, and a small porch with columns and greenery. The backyard is expansive, with a pool area bordered by a deck and lounge chairs, and the entire property is enclosed by a light-colored stone wall. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and stone walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and lush landscaping with a clear view of the house facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, side yard, and the main house structure with visible windows and entry path.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, poolside lounge area, and covered patio adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, additional landscaping, and the detached garage structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a short path, small porch with columns, decorative greenery, and a prominent gate.
